title: sloanea nitida
intro: Sloanea nitida, also known as the Makamaka tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae, native to the Pacific Islands, including Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sloanea nitida include the potential treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The herbal preparations of Sloanea nitida include making teas, infusions, and tinctures from the leaves, bark, and roots, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
